# Pull Request Template

## Summary

Short description of the change and motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Related issues

- Closes # (issue number)

## How to test

Steps to reproduce or test the change locally.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and `npm test`
- [ ] I updated the documentation if needed
- [ ] I added a changelog entry if this is noteworthy

## Additional notes

Any extra context for reviewers.
